name: uilayouts-image-tabs
title: Image Tabs
author: UI LAYOUT
description: Pairs descriptive tabs with a responsive caller-provided visual for the active item.

changes: Changed root-alias imports to the copied hook and utility paths.
Moved selection from a clickable div to the existing header as a button and added tablist, tab, and tabpanel relationships.
Added arrow, Home, and End keyboard navigation plus reduced-motion transitions.
Retained only the upstream cn helper and removed site configuration, URLs, and unrelated timing helpers.

modifications.change: Rewired copied support imports, moved activation to a button, added complete tab semantics and keyboard navigation, and disabled transitions for reduced motion.
modifications.reason: Preserve the source interaction while making it keyboard-operable and semantically identifiable as tabs.
Match the repository source format without changing behavior.

modifications.change: Removed unrelated site configuration and timing helpers, retaining cn only.
modifications.reason: Keep the copied support closure minimal and remove site URLs.
